title: Journals schema for the manual customer invoice template
description: A schema for retrieving template for the manual customer invoice.

collection.description: The array containing all customers that can be associated with the template.

customerNumber.description: The customer number is a positive unique numerical identifier with a maximum of 9 digits.

self.description: A unique reference to the manual customer invoice with the specific customer resource.
